languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers. After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius, I am being too hard on the Rogue Trader. The strain of that place has taken a toll on me. I ought to strive to emulate your fortitude. I will make my apologies, and then you can help me mend you."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн резко замолкает, обернувшись за плечо, словно прислушивается к кому-то. Обычно за этим плечом парит его дражайший коллега. Спустя пару мгновений техножрец кивает пустому месту.{/n} "Ты прав, Нунциус, я слишком строг к Вольному Торговцу. Давление этого места плохо на мне сказывается, мне стоит брать пример с твоей выдержки. Я принесу извинения, а после ты поможешь тебя починить".

languages.text: {n}Eogunn deja de hablar de repente y echa la vista atrás como si escuchara a alguien, en la dirección en la que suele flotar su querido colega. Tras un momento, el tecnosacerdote asiente al hueco vacío.{/n} «Tiene razón, Nuncius, estoy siendo muy duro con {mf|el|la} Comerciante. Las inclemencias de ese lugar se han cobrado su precio. Debería hacer lo posible por imitar tu fortaleza. Me disculparé y, después, podrá ayudarme arreglarle».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers. languages.text: {n}伊奥贡突然停住话头，扭头望向身后，仿佛在倾听某人的话——他正看着他最亲爱的同僚平时悬浮的位置。片刻之后，技术神甫对着空气点了点头。{/n}“你说得对，努恩修斯，我对行商浪人太苛刻了。那个地方的折磨对我造成了影响。我应该学习你的坚韧。我会道歉的，然后你再帮我修复你自己。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers. After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius, I am being too hard on the Rogue Trader. The strain of that place has taken a toll on me. I ought to strive to emulate your fortitude. I will make my apologies, and then you can help me mend you."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn s'interrompt brusquement et tourne la tête, comme s'il écoutait quelqu'un. Il regarde par-dessus son épaule, à l'endroit où son cher collègue flotte habituellement. Après quelques instants, le technoprêtre hoche la tête.{/n} « Tu as raison, Nuncius. Je suis trop sévère avec {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}. C'est cet endroit qui me monte à la tête. Je ferais mieux de prendre ton courage pour exemple. Je vais lui présenter mes excuses, après quoi nous pourrons te rétablir ensemble. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers. After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius, I am being too hard on the Rogue Trader. The strain of that place has taken a toll on me. I ought to strive to emulate your fortitude. I will make my apologies, and then you can help me mend you."

Après quelques instants, le technoprêtre hoche la tête.{/n} « Tu as raison, Nuncius. Je suis trop sévère avec {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}. C'est cet endroit qui me monte à la tête. Je ferais mieux de prendre ton courage pour exemple. Je vais lui présenter mes excuses, après quoi nous pourrons te rétablir ensemble. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn bricht ab und sieht über seine Schulter, als würde er jemandem zuhören ... sein Blick ruht auf der Stelle, an der sein geschätzter Kollege für gewöhnlich schwebt. Nach einigen Sekunden nickt der Techpriester in besagte Richtung.{/n} "Ihr habt recht, Nuncius, ich bin zu streng mit {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin}. Vielleicht fordern die Strapazen dieses Ortes ihren Tribut von mir. Ich sollte versuchen, Eure Standhaftigkeit zu emulieren. Ich werde mich entschuldigen, und dann könnt Ihr mir helfen, Euch zu heilen."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは突然話すのを止め、誰かの話を聞くように肩越しに覗き込んだ。しばらくの後、技術司祭は誰もいない空気にうなずいた。{/n}「君の言うとおりだ、ヌンキウス。私はローグ・トレーダーに厳しすぎる。あの場所での緊張が私を蝕んでいる。あなたのような不屈の精神を見習わなければなりません。私は謝罪します、そして、あなたは私があなたを修復するのを助けることができます。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers. After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius, I am being too hard on the Rogue Trader. The strain of that place has taken a toll on me. I ought to strive to emulate your fortitude. I will make my apologies, and then you can help me mend you."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは突然話すのを止め、誰かの話を聞くように肩越しに覗き込んだ。しばらくの後、技術司祭は誰もいない空気にうなずいた。{/n}「君の言うとおりだ、ヌンキウス。私はローグ・トレーダーに厳しすぎる。あの場所での緊張が私を蝕んでいる。あなたのような不屈の精神を見習わなければなりません。私は謝罪します、そして、あなたは私があなたを修復するのを助けることができます。」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, aniden konuşmayı kesip sanki birini dinliyormuş gibi omzunun üzerinden bakıyor. Pek değerli meslektaşının genellikle süzüldüğü yere bakıyor. Birkaç saniye sonra Tekno Rahip, boşluğa doğru başını sallıyor.{/n} "Haklısın Nuncius, Hür Tacir'e karşı fazla sertim. Oranın baskısı beni çok yıprattı. Metanetini örnek almaya çalışmalıyım. Özür dileyeyim, sonra seni onarmama yardım edebilirsin."
